relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains a repayment schedule for an existing loan (Personal Loan), while the outbound file is a payment holiday application request. Although both involve loans and customer data, they represent fundamentally different business processes: one is a read-only schedule artifact, the other is a new application submission. The account type mismatch (Personal Loan vs. Mortgage), the absence of application-specific fields in the inbound schema (applicationId, requestedBy, applicationStatus, paymentHolidayRequest details), and the directional flow (credit→customer_services inbound, customer_services→credit outbound) suggest these are independent workflows rather than a data lineage chain.
